SweepstakeSite.title: Sweepstake Site
SweepstakeSite.description: Information about a sweepstakes casino site and its bonuses.

signupDate.description: Date of sign up and profile creation.

lastCollectedAt.description: The last time the daily bonus was collected.

isWheelBonus.description: Whether the site has a wheel spin bonus.

payoutSpeedRank.description: Numeric rank for payout speed (lower is faster).

UserProgress.title: User Progress
UserProgress.description: Tracks a user's collection progress for each site.

siteId.description: The ID of the sweepstakes site.

lastCollectedAt.description: The last time the daily bonus was collected.

visitCount.description: Number of times the site has been visited.

hasAccount.description: Whether the user has an active profile on this site.

/users/{userId}/progress.description: User-specific tracking data for each site.
